programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle for Block D comes to a shocking end and the winner that emerges from the cloud of dust stuns the audience even more! Meanwhile, Luffy, Zoro, Kin'emon, and Wicka of the Tontatta Tribe are about to reach the lift to the palace.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Viola, aka Violet, once a great princess of the Dressrosa family, shows Luffy & the others a secret entrance into the palace which avoids the use of the heavily-guarded lift. In the palace's Suit Chamber, Navy Admiral Fujitora reveals his plans.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The final round at the Corrida Colosseum finally begins, as Diamante joins the combatants in an all-out struggle to win the Flare-Flare Fruit! As the stakes escalate, can one champion beat the others & snatch the fruit from the Colosseum's newest hazard?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his group continue their ascent towards Doflamingo's inner sanctum, but standing in their way is an executive of the family whose power is so strong moving past him seems impossible! Meanwhile, Cavendish learns the dark secrets of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Operation SOP finally gets underway but as Leo makes the dash to hide the Tatabasco grape in Sugar's fruit basket, Robin calls for an emergency stop to the plan! Meanwhile, Luffy, Violet, and Zoro are stalled by Pica whose sheer size overwhelms them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Operation SOP is underway and nearing its final stage! But Trebol proves a far stronger guard for Sugar than was expected, so Robin hatches a plan to lure him away. But is there enough time to execute the plan before the ruse is discovered?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas are devastated by Trebol's furious attack, but as Usopp tries to convince Leo to abort the operation, Leo tells him about their commander Toy Soldier's stunning true identity! The Toy Soldier finally shakes off Lao G and gets moving again!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro continues his deadly duel with the nearly indestructible Pica! While the Toy Soldier narrowly escapes Lao G only to come face to face with Gladius! Luffy continues his mad dash to the top of the palace to face Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the Tontattas beaten, Robin turned into a toy, and Luffy, Franky, and the others busy elsewhere, Usopp is the last hope for Operation SOP! But will he be able to muster the confidence and courage to face the terrible Trebol?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp runs into trouble in his battle with Treebol, and flashback sheds light on how a young Kyros made the shocking transition from murderer to one of King Riku's most trusted men.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the Royal Palace, Viola, Luffy, and the Toy Soldier have hidden themselves outside Doflamingo's chamber, only to have more enemies approach from behind, leaving them surrounded! Meanwhile, Franky is knocked out cold by the Navy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Toys all across Dressrosa regain their human form, a flood of forgotten memories return, and Kyros launches a long overdue attack on the villainous tyrant Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kyros finally taking down Doflamingo leaves Doflamingo's clan shocked! Meanwhile at the Colosseum, Rebecca gets her memories of her loving father Kyros back, and Sabo makes a move to end the championship battle by blowing up the whole ring!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy hurries to free Law, but with their pirate alliance dissolved, will Law still see Luffy as an ally? Meanwhile, Usopp has convinced his newfound followers to destroy the factory! Doflamingo's defeat has thrown Dressrosa into chaos.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mystery of Doflamingo's return from the dead is revealed! But there isn't much time to ponder how it happened, as his plan to silence the country of Dressrosa unfolds, spelling doom for the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the people of Dressrosa see their friends and loved ones slaughter each other under the manipulation of Doflamingo, memories of 10 years ago rush back, and the truth of that event becomes clear. Doflamingo announces the rules for his deadly game.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Doflamingo and Fujitora's agreement to not engage each other lasts for the moment - meaning all eyes are turned towards taking down the Straw Hats and claiming the rewards! And as Luffy starts heading to the Royal Palace, Fujitora stands in his way!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin, Usopp, the Tontattas and the others make moves to rejoin Luffy as Doflamingo's deadly game rages on! Meanwhile, Kin'emon makes it to the trash heap in his search for his friend Kanjuro - just as Pica emerges in the town.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Luffy & the others recovering from Pica's attack, the game is afoot! Luffy has just enough time to regroup and set out to find Doflamingo, only to find that the dastardly Warlord has more enemies than he might realize! A strange argument breaks out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chin Jao and Elizabello successfully break Pica's giant arm but the rock giant is unfazed and starts throwing even more destructive punches at Luffy and his band of unwanted collaborators! Meanwhile, Navy Admiral Fujitora moves into action.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Moocy fast approach the showdown with Doflamingo - while the others with a beef against him continue to tag along. Meanwhile, Violet finds the key to Law's handcuffs, and Rebecca pledges to deliver it to him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes headway toward Doflamingo's refuge, making his way through Doflamingo's guards, while down below Admiral Fujitora faces off against Sabo, who has the power of the Fire Fist from eating the Flare-Flare Fruit!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy cuts a lucky break as Kelly Funk shows him a shortcut to the Palace! But all may not be as it seems... Meanwhile, Franky and Zoro are locked in one-on-one duels, while Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo enlist the help of the Tontattas.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Penned in at the bottom of a well, Luffy and Law are caught in a trap! But someone has come to save them who they least expect! Meanwhile, the Tontattas help Franky break in to the SMILE factory, and Bartolomeo resorts to tactics he used in the Colosseum.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas locate their captive comrades and seem to be able to get the message to them - the prison break is on! Meanwhile, heavy-hitters from the Colosseum turn from wringing each other's necks towards a unified plan.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hidden far underground, Kin'emon finds his old friend Kanjuro whose powers allow the two to, quickly, but not elegantly, escape to the surface! Meanwhile, Cavendish shares his fears that the "Birdcage" game Doflamingo is playing has been rigged all along.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas are in full revolt! But can they keep their wits about them long enough to make it out? Meanwhile, Zoro finally gains the upper hand against Pica, and Franky finds a way to deal with Señor Pink.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After what appears to be a fatal road rage incident, authorities in Clifton, Ariz., follow a trail of recovered text messages that suggest this was no random attack, but instead a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A Florida woman's search for her missing husband takes a turn when his body is found in a landfill; as detectives dig into his home life, the victim's family becomes a crucial link to uncovering the truth.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A beloved psychologist is found murdered and left in the trunk of a car in the Nevada desert; as the strange case unfolds, police discover he may have been the victim of a model aiming to maintain her lavish lifestyle.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A Peruvian healthcare worker gets a second chance at love until he's found murdered in his apartment; investigators set out to discover whether his new bride is a grieving widow or a femme fatale.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A healthcare worker is viciously attacked in her home with only her daughter as a witness; police must follow the clues at the scene to discover the truth behind the attack.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Firefighters are called to the scene of an Iowa family's home to find the residence up in flames; as the smoke clears, they discover the charred remains of a man and question whether the fire and his death were truly accidental.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The fatal shooting of a well-known San Antonio rapper puts the community on high alert as police take part in a manhunt to track down the killer; as they piece together the evidence, witnesses point the finger at a scorned lover fueled by rage.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A woman pursuing her dreams is found drugged in her home; across New York, another person with similar symptoms comes forward, and authorities connect the cases, exposing an international fugitive with a ruthless pattern.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When an Arkansas family man is shot to death in his home, his widow is quick to point the blame around town; detectives tail the suspects, a torrid affair and deadly secret come to light, revealing a manipulative wolf in sheep's clothing.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A frantic Ohio woman seeks refuge in a fast-food restaurant after escaping from a deadly assault; police sort through contradicting stories to expose a habitual criminal.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a devoted husband and father is found shot to death on his bathroom floor, the case is quickly ruled a homicide; a key witness starts changing their story, detectives must determine if this was an act of self-defense or premeditated murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A Wild West reenactor is found dead in his private Arizona ranch; police race to find the killer of the beloved showman; as investigators connect the dots, they realize the cold-blooded mastermind is lurking close to home.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When the spouse of a high-profile defense attorney is found dead in their Arkansas home, police theorize if a disgruntled client could be to blame; the investigation exposes an obsessive admirer with a delusional motive to murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After a routine welfare check, Albuquerque police discover a beloved teacher has vanished; as investigators dive into her family history, they uncover a shocking murder plot driven by vengeance and jealousy.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After an Oregon wife's failed suicide attempt results in her husband's death, the cracks in a seemingly perfect marriage are brought to light; the investigation uncovers if his inadvertent death is truly an accident or a deadly cover-up.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A Georgia woman who is brutally stabbed provides police with a suspect's name before succumbing to her injuries; as the manhunt for the killer begins, a pattern of toxicity exposes a violent past and more than one murder.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: A Ash se le está dificultando hacer que Chikorita lo obedezca, y la Enfermera Joy cree que se debe a celos por la amistad de Ash con Pikachu. ¿Podrá Ash probarle a Chikorita lo mucho que significa para él?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes conocen a un Entrenador cuyos Hoppip pueden predecir el clima. Pero dos tormentas se acercan en el horizonte... ¡Y una de ellas se llama "Equipo Rocket"!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El legendario superhéroe Gligarman envejece y considera colgar su capa. Cuando Ash y sus amigos vagan por el pueblo, traen consigo un reto que podría ser su batalla final: ¡el Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando una revoltosa horda de Mareep arruina sus planes de almuerzo, nuestros héroes deciden ayudar a su tímido pastor, justo a tiempo para competir en un festival de batalla local.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante de un centro de entrenamiento Pokémon pierde su interés en las batallas Pokémon y prefiere construir una gran base de datos Pokémon, Ash debe convencerlo de que las batallas son más que probabilidad.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando Ash encuentra un Cyndaquil salvaje, está ansioso por atraparlo… ¡pero pueden apostar que no es el único!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tras llegar a Pueblo Azalea, Ash descuidadamente provoca a sus residentes, quienes adoran a SlowPoké. Y las cosas sólo empeoran cuando llega el Equipo Rocket, tratando de robar hasta al último SlowPoké. ¿Qué podrá hacer Ash?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tal como prometió al Profesor Oak, Ash entrega la misteriosa Bola GS a un renovado experto en Pokébolas. Pero el fruto de su trabajo casi se arruina cuando el Equipo Rocket aparece en escena.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash por fin llega al Gimnasio Azalea, pero Cyndaquil no tiene la energía para derrotar al Líder de Gimnasio. Conforme la batalla se enciende, Ash debe esforzarse al máximo para derrotar al poderoso Pokémon tipo Insecto.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Un Entrenador joven y poco experimentado asustó a su propio Farfetch'd. Nuestros héroes están felices de ayudarlo, pero tendrán que hallarlo antes que el Equipo Rocket.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En un festival anual de intercambio Pokémon, un joven Entrenador busca un buen cambio por su Wobbuffet. El trío del Equipo Rocket también busca oportunidades, pero ambos grupos de Entrenadores obtienen más de lo que pidieron.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Una inesperada competencia de apaga incendios Pokémon reúne a nuestros héroes con algunos viejos amigos, el escuadrón Squirtle! pero necesitan desesperadamente a un líder, así que Ash y Squirtle se reintegran a sus filas.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran con una guardería para Wooper y una emergencia requiere del maestro, nuestros héroes van al rescate. Pero, como siempre, el Equipo Rocket está a la vuelta de la esquina, y no trama nada bueno…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su camino hacia ciudad Caña Dorada, nuestros héroes se ven obligados a atravesar un túnel resguardado por un furioso Onix. Para hacer las cosas más difíciles, el equipo Rocket, Snubbull y Jigglypuff llegan de visita…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Siguiendo una serie de misteriosos robos, nuestros héroes descubren a unos Houndour luchando por sobrevivir en la naturaleza. Para ayudar a estos Pokémon ladrones a reformarse, Ash y sus amigos tendrán que ganarse su confianza.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: La rivalidad entre Ash y Misty se reaviva cuando ambos tratan de capturar a Totodile a la vez. Como no saben cuál Pokébola lo capturó, tendrán una batalla para decidir quién será el nuevo Entrenador de Totodile.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando Ash oye de un entrenador virtualmente invencible, quiere ir a retarlo. Pero el Vulpix de Brock y el Cyndaquil de Ash reciben una paliza de su Skarmory, ¡a pesar de su ventaja de tipo! ¿Cómo logrará Ash derrotarlo?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El Totodile de Ash se enamora de un Azumarill, que es la artista estrella de un circo Pokémon. Cuando el Equipo Rocket llega a robar el espectáculo, el corazón de Azumarill no será la única cosa que Totodile deba ganar.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash tiene la vista puesta en un raro Noctowl de un color inusual, pero este astuto Pokémon usa repetidamente Hipnosis para engañarlo. ¿Podrá Ash capturar a este Noctowl dormilón?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Un ataque sorpresa de un grupo de Ursaring hace que nuestros héroes y el Equipo Rocket busquen refugio. En el caos, los grupos se separan, y las poco entusiasmadas parejas tienen que trabajar juntas. Pero, ¿por cuánto tiempo?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tras una advertencia en el bosque sobre un travieso Pokémon tipo Fantasma, nuestros héroes llegan a un pueblo donde todos usan tipos Psíquico para repelerlos. Pronto llegan temibles noticias: ¡un Gengar gigante anda suelto!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Una repentina moda en la adivinación Pokémon resulta ser un plan para robar a los Pokémon de los Entrenadores locales. Pero esta vez Jessie, James y Meowth no son los responsables. ¿Quiénes son estos villanos?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡Ash Ketchum, un niño de diez años de Pueblo Paleta, finalmente tiene la edad para recibir a su primer Pokémon! Sin embargo, se queda dormido y el único Pokémon restante en el laboratorio del profesor Oak es un terco Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash corre hacia Ciudad Viridian con su herido Pikachu, ahí se encuentra con Jessie, James, y Meowth del Equipo Rocket, así como con Misty, quien está molesta porque Ash descompuso su bicicleta.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡Ash descubre y atrapa a su primer Pokémon! Aunque está emocionada, Misty siente repugnancia por su nuevo amigo Pokémon tipo insecto.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡Un furioso enjambre de Beedrill ataca a Ash y a Samurái a la mitad de un duelo de Metapod! Ash escapa, dejando atrás a su Metapod, quien está molesto con él por abandonarlo.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash desafía al líder de gimnasio de Ciudad Plateada, Brock, pero ni siquiera Pikachu tiene oportunidad contra los Pokémon tipo roca de Brock. Con la ayuda del misterioso Flint, Ash entrenará duro antes de la revancha.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Un científico guía a Ash y a sus a amigos a las profundidades de Mr. Moon para encontrar la famosa piedra lunar, la cual se dice tiene el poder de incrementar el poder de los Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de ganar su segunda medalla, Ash parte triunfal hacia Ciudad Carmín. En el camino escucha acerca de AJ, un entrenador a punto de conseguir 100 victorias seguidas. ¡Lleno de confianza, Ash reta a este temible entrenador!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash conoce a algunos estudiantes, quienes molestan a su compañero Joe. Joe insiste en que se necesita un trato duro para que él sea lo suficientemente fuerte para graduarse. Ash no está de acuerdo.

programme.title: The Moody Blues - Days of Future Passed Live

programme.title: George Thorogood & The Destroyers: Live at Montreux 2013
programme.desc: In a career that stretches back to the mid-seventies, Thorogood and his band have released 16 albums with worldwide sales in excess of 15 million. 2013 saw George & The Destroyers make their long overdue debut at the legendary Montreux Jazz Festival.

programme.title: Willie Nelson - Live at iTunes Festival
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Johnny Cash: Live at Montreux 1994
programme.desc: This classic concert features favorites like Folsom Prison Blues, I Walk the Line and Ghost Riders in the Sky. Cash welcome his wife June Carter Cash on two tracks.

programme.title: Duane Allman - Song of the South
programme.desc: Duane Allman, the lead guitarist and driving force behind Southern Rock pioneers The Allman Brothers Band, lived a tragically short life, but during his brief career he changed music forever.

programme.title: The Who: Live At The Isle Of Wight Festival 2004
programme.desc: In 2004 The Who returned to the Isle Of Wight Festival for the first time since their legendary performance in 1970; the group's UK concerts in 2004 were the first in their home country since the death of founder member John Entwistle.

programme.title: Electric Light Orchestra - Live at Wembley 1978
programme.desc: Captured live at London's Wembley Arena and directed by Mike Mansfield this space-age show will live forever in rock history as, quite literally, out of this world.

programme.title: Elton John: Live in London 2013
programme.desc: Filmed at the Roundhouse in London, this concert film gives fans a live experience from start to finish; Elton John performs his hits: "Tiny Dancer," "Rocket Man," "Your Song," and many more.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Zombie Nightmare
programme.desc: The dead have risen and they're drinking Tim Hortons! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin, and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax Presents: Horror Express
programme.desc: The Deadly Mantis showed us that the life of a palaeontologist is one of intrigue, romance, and unstoppable monsters. Horror Express does nothing to dispel this notion, so that presumably means it can only be true.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Bloody Pit of Horror
programme.desc: Filmed in PSYCHOVISION, (which we hear Fellini used to shoot in), Bloody Pit of Horror is must see Italian horror at its cheesiest. Mike, Kevin and Bill brave the spider piñata and give it their bloody best.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Terror In The Wax Museum
programme.desc: Mike, Kevin, and Bill all hope to one day be enshrined in Madame Tussauds. Until then, they'll be settling for this riff. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax Live: Amityville - The Evil Escapes
programme.desc: There's still evil up there at the old Amityville house. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: Rifftrax Live: House On Haunted Hill
programme.desc: Yes, horror classic House on Haunted Hill provides a mesmerizing walk down “people actually used to find this SCARY?!” lane. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with live commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Hillbillys in a Haunted House
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 60's non-scary horror classic! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill.

programme.title: RiffTrax Shorts: Six Murderous Beliefs
programme.desc: These beliefs are bad, and not just “the Tim Burton Planet of the Apes is the best version” bad. They're seriously bad. This short is a parody and contains a comedic commentary by RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Night That Dracula Saved The World
programme.desc: While The Night that Dracula Saved the World does not have Harvey Korman, or crappy animation, or an elderly wookie pleasuring itself, it does have Judd Hirsch. Please do not go into this special expecting not to see Judd Hirsch. Fair warning.

programme.desc: Buying partnerships are tested at an auction in Brampton. Bogart puts Paul on a diet. Meanwhile, Rick squirms when Cindy wants him to wear a spiffy new shirt. Ursula tries on her bossy-pants, but what Roy finds really puts the icing on the cake.

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: The salvage game is all about you scratch my back and I’ll scratch yours. The crew is towing a damaged yacht to a North Queensland boatyard. The vessel has a broken keel, no steering capacity and it’s taking on water.

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: A catamaran is smashed up on the rocks and needs to be salvaged. It’s a tricky retrieval with lots of moving parts. They’ll need to use their salvage vessel FD8 .

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: The team unearths a ship's log detailing the burial of treasure on an island eerily similar to Oak Island, and Rick and Gary make what may prove to be the biggest find on Oak Island, ever.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: Further investigation suggests a link between the mysterious medieval cross and the Knights Templar.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: A skeleton key and maps from Fred Nolan's archives open a new door in the Lagina's quest, while new evidence suggests a Templar connection to the lead cross found in Smith's Cove.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: The plot thickens around the discovery of the lead cross as a new theory points to possible ancient origins. Rick pulls an artifact from the swamp that may support one of Fred Nolan's theories.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: The discovery of the mysterious lead cross raised new questions about a Knights Templar connection. Tonight, we take a look at Templar history and the compelling Templar clues the team has found so far.

programme.title: Auction Hunters

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Vala's (Claudia Black) father Jacek (guest star Fred Willard) contacts Stargate Command wishing to trade information about a series of planned attacks on Earth in exchange for sanctuary on the planet. Also starring Ben Browder and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: Juan trata de sacar a Paula de su vida con dinero, pero ella no está dispuesta. Sofía intenta convencerla para que firme el acuerdo y se vayan las dos para siempre de la casa. Pedro y Julieta son descubiertos y se declara una guerra entre hermanos.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José traiciona a su hermano por dinero e intenta aliarse con Pedro para quitarle la administración de la hacienda. Sofía hace revelaciones a Paula sobre la identidad de su padre, para empujarla a tomar las decisiones que ella está tramando.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José reúne a todos los hermanos y se enfrenta a Juan porque quiere reemplazarlo. Julieta mantiene su posición con dignidad y no accede a hacer las paces con su marido, mientras Paula decide seguir insistiendo sin saber que una verdad la persigue.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.desc: Teams reach new heights in Berlin, as they walk face-first down the exterior of a building for nearly 200 feet.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Hyderabad, India, where they must complete double the detours, double the road blocks and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The first ever mega leg in race history continues through Hyderabad, India, where teams compete in double the detours and double the road blocks, and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams race through Siem Reap, Cambodia, where they face the second and final double U-turn of the season.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Brady Bunch

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia has a crush on her new dentist, which only intensifies when she mistakes an opportunity to babysit for him as a date with him to the ballet.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby becomes obsessed with Jesse James. Mike and Carol don't approve of his new hero, and try to find a way to convince him that James was nothing but a "mean, dirty killer."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia breaks a date with Charlie when "big man on campus" Doug Simpson asks her out. However, after she gets hit in the nose with a football, Doug Simpson breaks his date with her.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch

programme.title: The Brady Bunch

programme.desc: The Brady girls try to play matchmaker between Carol's free-spirited grandmother and stick-in-the-mud Grandpa Brady.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares…and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The curator of a murderers' row in a soon-to-be-defunct wax museum persuades the owner to let him keep the figures for awhile.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bored, wealthy businessman gets a chance to go back in time and start over, armed with all the knowledge he's acquired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Toy designer Horace Ford spends most of his time reminiscing about his idyllic childhood. But when he gets a chance to go back to those years he gets a bitter taste of reality.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man named Benteen leads a colony of Americans stranded on a desert planet for 30 years.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A young couple book passage on a trans-Atlantic cruise, hoping to salvage their marriage.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An untalented would-be writer's career takes off when the ghost of William Shakespeare writes his script.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson believes he sees a gremlin on the wing of the commercial aircraft he is taking back home... from the sanitarium, where he has been committed for six months after a mental breakdown during a similar flight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three National Guardsmen explore the site of Custer's Last Stand and encounter mysterious phenomenon that hint at the original battle occurring just out of sight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Trying to keep up with his younger wife, Harmon convinces his brother to inject him with an experimental youth serum.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old man fears that he will die if his grandfather clock stops running.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bunny receives a ring from her fan club in her home town. In the ring she sees the faces of people from her hometown telling her she's needed there so she returns home.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Driving home one rainy evening, Oliver Pope accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Pope flees the scene, determined to hide his guilt, but his car has other ideas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Maggie, Gabriel, Negan and Elijah battle the Reapers for food; Aaron and the Alexandrians must survive a storm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The heroes experience Halloween in the Commonwealth; Daryl and Rosita undergo military training led by Mercer; Carol investigates Ezekiel's medical condition.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene looks for Stephanie after she mysteriously goes missing; Connie investigates a story on Trooper Davis; Carol helps Hornsby with a labor dispute at a drug farm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron and Maggie meet Gov. Pamela Milton as she tours Alexandria, Oceanside and Hilltop; Ezekiel finds himself lucky during a routine checkup; Eugene processes Max's story.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia and Elijah help a stranger from another community called Riverbend; they run into Aaron, who tells them about a mission he embarked on with Gabriel as emissaries for the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia and Elijah help Aaron and Gabriel on a rescue mission; in the chaos, Negan finds himself watching over Hershel; Sebastian coerces Daryl and Rosita into pulling a heist.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hornsby marches Daryl and troops to confront Maggie at Hilltop; after a harrowing heist, Rosita gets Connie, Kelly, Eugene, and Max to investigate the Miltons; Ezekiel helps hospital patients in need.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie prepares to defend Hilltop and the people of Riverbend against Hornsby; Hornsby hires Leah to kill Maggie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Negan rush to the Commonwealth to stop Hornsby from going after their families; Pamela deals with protestors demanding justice for Sebastian's crimes; Mercer needs Rosita's help to fight a swarm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol makes a deal with Pamela to wipe the slate clean on behalf of her friends; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah get on the road to Oceanside to fill them in on a plan; the Commonwealth celebrates Founders Day.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene goes on the run after the Founders Day incident; Pamela tasks Mercer to investigate his whereabouts, to Max and Princess' dismay; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah encounter an unusual complication at an abandoned Renaissance Faire.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol investigate the whereabouts of their friends after Pamela disappears them from the Commonwealth; Pamela asks Yumiko to prosecute Eugene on behalf of the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Separated from their children, Maggie, Gabriel and Rosita track a military convoy to a mysterious destination; Ezekiel, Kelly, Negan and Annie find themselves at a work site; Daryl and Carol follow a train that has taken Connie aboard.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ezekiel and Negan team up to lead a clandestine labor revolt against the warden; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah catch up with Luke and Jules fleeing Oceanside; Eugene stands trial with Yumiko as his defense attorney.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Alexandrians and the prisoners head back to the Commonwealth to confront Pamela Milton; a swarm approaches the city.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Maggie, Gabriel, Negan y Elijah luchan contra los Segadores por comida. Aaron debe sobrevivir a una tormenta.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo celebra Halloween en el interior de la Mancomunidad. Daryl y Rosita se someten a un entrenamiento militar dirigido por Mercer, mientras Carol investiga el problema de salud de Ezekiel.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene busca a Stephanie, que desapareció misteriosamente. Connie investiga al soldado Davis. Carol ayuda a Lance a investigar una comunidad que está extorsionando a la Mancomunidad por dinero.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aarón y Maggie se encuentran a la gobernadora Pamela Milton mientras recorre Alejandría, Oceanside e Hilltop. Ezequiel tiene suerte durante un control de rutina. Eugene procesa la historia de Max.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia y Elijah ayudan a un extraño de otra comunidad llamada Riverbend. Se encuentran con Aarón, quien les cuenta sobre una misión en la que se embarcó con Gabriel como emisarios de la Mancomunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia y Elijah ayudan a Aaron y a Gabriel en una misión de rescate. En medio del caos, Negan vigila a Hershel. Sebastián fuerza a Daryl y Rosita a realizar un atraco.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hornsby obliga a Daryl y a sus tropas a enfrentarse contra Maggie en Hilltop. Tras un angustioso atraco, Rosita consigue que Connie, Kelly, Eugene y Max investiguen a los Milton. Ezekiel ayuda a los pacientes del hospital.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie se prepara para defender Hilltop y a los habitantes de Riverbend frente al ataque de Hornsby. Mientras tanto, este contrata a Leah para que la mate.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Negan se introducen en la Mancomunidad para obligar a Hornsby a que deje de perseguir a sus familias. Pamela enfrenta las protestas de aquellos que están hartos de la impunidad de los crímenes de Sebastian.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Pamela hacen un trato de borrón y cuenta nueva en nombre de sus amigos. Aaron, Jerry, Lydia y Elijah se marchan hacia Oceanside para hablarles de un plan. La Commonwealth celebra el Día de los Fundadores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene huye después del incidente del Día de los Fundadores. Pamela le pide a Mercer que investigue dónde está, para disgusto de Max y La Princesa. Por otro lado, Aaron, Jerry, Lydia y Elijah se topan con un contratiempo peculiar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol investigan el paradero de sus amigos después de que Pamela los hiciera desaparecer de la Commonwealth. Por desgracia, su única pista es Hornsby. Por otro lado, Pamela le pide a Yumiko que procese a Eugene en nombre de la Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de separarse de sus hijos, Maggie, Gabriel y Rosita siguen un convoy militar hasta un destino misterioso. Ezekiel, Kelly, Negan y Annie acaban en una zona de obras. Daryl y Carol siguen a un tren que lleva a Connie a bordo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ezequiel y Negan organizan una revuelta clandestina contra los guardianes. Aarón, Jerry, Lydia y Elijah se unen a Luke y a Jules durante su huida a la costa. Además, Eugene es juzgado con el apoyo de Yumiko como abogada defensora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los alejandrinos y los prisioneros vuelven a la Commonwealth para enfrentarse a Pamela Milton. Por otro lado, una horda se acerca a la ciudad.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: It's demolition day at the house in South Atlanta. The homeowners' daughter learns to use power tools to build a lending library. An ivy-covered oak overhanging the roof is safely trimmed back.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A stem wall foundation is poured, and a custom wallpaper is designed. The homeowner installs a vapor barrier in the crawl space and tours an outdoor school for backyard inspiration.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The new interior spaces are toured. The HVAC ducting is installed. Kitchen location options are explored, and the old windows are restored. The homeowners' daughter creates a 3d tour of the house.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Interior framing is almost complete. Siding is installed on the exterior. A major motion picture studio is visited. The house is protected from lightning strikes. The Dracut Centre School is restored.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old porch posts are repaired. The bathrooms get a new wall treatment. Ceiling joists are left exposed ceiling. The homeowners choose a front door and visit Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.'s home.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The front door is stripped of paint. The HVAC system is connected and tested. Floating shelves are installed. The brick steps are repaired. An herb garden is planted, and the custom wallpaper is hung.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The 1890s Victorian house in Atlanta once owned by South Atlanta's first black postmaster was a dilapidated and abandoned structure. Now, it has been restored and the crew is back for a tour.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The crew is back in Massachusetts to start a new project—a modest 1902 Victorian in the town of Newburyport. They meet the homeowners, tour the project, and discuss the possible challenges.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The main power is disconnected, and temporary power is run before demo begins. Asbestos abatement is performed. The back bump out is removed. A carpenter talks about working with Parkinson's disease.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Work is underway for the new three-story bump out, the interior is demolished, and a new winder staircase is built. A retaining wall is built, and the town wastewater treatment facility is toured.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Shingles are installed on a small roof valley. Exterior windows are trimmed with a prefabricated trim system. The homeowners make design selections. The railing on the original staircase is raised.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Curb appeal is added to the front yard. A custom desk is built using off-the-shelf material. An electric vehicle charger is installed, and the secret to achieving a high gloss paint finish is shared.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Renovation on the 1902 house is done and the homeowners are ready to move in, but first, the crew and homeowners participate in the town's annual bed race. After, they meet at the house for a tour.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The crew takes on a first period home in the town of Ipswich, MA. A brief history on heating first period homes is given. The homeowners get a lesson on how to properly salvage the old floors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The architect explains the architectural features of a first period gambrel and shares his plans for improvement. Demo starts in the ell. The town historian gives a tour of a 1717 first period home.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The house is supported while the foundation is demoed. A plan is devised to raise the timber frame in the ell. An old cistern is examined. Drainage issues are addressed. A book from 1826 is found.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The timber frame structure of the ell is disassembled to be rebuilt later. A clapboard manufacturer in Maine is visited. Fireplace designs are discussed. The homeowner considers a new house color.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A fireplace is demoed; but the chimney is saved. Restoration of the timber frame begins. A sewer ejector is installed. The steel ridge beam for the new ell is prepped. Kevin goes clamming.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old ell has been reassembled, and the new fireplace is constructed. A steel beam is craned into place to carry the weight of the roof in the new ell. The homeowner shops for a kitchen countertop.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The roof is insulated from the outside. Framing presents a challenge for running pipes. A lighting solution for the new ell is devised, and a lesson is given on how to properly waterproof a roof.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: HVAC ducts are hidden in the gambrel. A cinderblock enclosure is covered to mimic the old stone foundation. Damage to an original gunstock post is repaired. New clapboards are weaved into the old.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The project is halfway through construction. A water harvesting system is installed in the yard. The old barn is replaced with a new boathouse built in a factory and assembled onsite in one day.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A granite water table is installed on the 1720 house. Original roof boards are installed on the ell ceiling. A fieldstone wall is built, and a young carpenter talks about his return to the trades.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Wide floorboards are installed to match the existing wood in the house. A sink is fabricated out of soapstone, and a backsplash is fabricated from an old board. Lighting installation wraps up.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A little over a year ago, renovation began on the 1720 first period home. Restoration is now complete. Tremendous care went into preserving the home's history while making modern improvements.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The crew is renovating a home to be accessible for a young boy with muscular dystrophy.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Construction began on the Lexington project. A new energy code affects the construction.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's friends are unconscious, leaving him to defeat Alexander the Great on his own!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Grandpa found the Millennium Puzzle decades ago, but little is known about the terrors, traps, turmoil, and treachery he faced to find the ancient artifact! See how it all began as we learn how Grandpa unearthed the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The evil spirit within the Millennium Ring has reunited with Bakura, prepped with a new monster to create the ultimate Shadow Game. And his first target is Kaiba!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends go to the dawn of the duel, to the place where it all began, to the land where the Pharaoh's mysteries lie: Egypt.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The past is quickly becoming perilous as the fearless bandit king Bakura has invaded the Pharaoh's palace to take down the keepers of the seven Millennium Items single-handedly!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Even with the potent power of Obelisk the Tormentor, the Pharaoh couldn't prevent the bandit Bakura from escaping. Everyone knows that thief will return for a rematch, so Seto has a plan to create a powerful army.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad vows to stop the bandit king Bakura's sneak attacks once and for all, but he may have made a promise he can't keep!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad, the first of the Pharaoh's guardians, has fallen. Even worse, the bandit king Bakura now has the Millennium Ring, making his Diabound even more unstoppable!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origins of the Millennium Items are revealed! Who forged these powerful artifacts, and why were they created? Though the Millennium Items are powerful, such power comes with a heavy price... a debt that may never be able to be repaid!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh calls forth the mighty Egyptian God Slifer the Sky Dragon to fight the bandit Bakura's Diabound, but when Diabound starts attacking the townspeople, the Pharaoh must protect them, even if it means sacrificing himself!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The bandit Bakura has stolen the Millennium Puzzle and sent the Pharaoh plummeting into the abyss. Now he's another step closer to obtaining all seven Millennium Items and resurrecting the malevolent Zorc, the greatest evil of all time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the Pharaoh are reunited, but the Pharaoh is powerless without the Millennium Puzzle! However, that won't stop the Pharaoh from a final showdown against the bandit king Bakura.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the showdown in the sands between the bandit Bakura and his ever-growing Diabound versus the Pharaoh, Mahad the Dark Magician, and the remaining guardians of the Pharaoh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the help of his father's spirit, the Pharaoh and his guardians defeated the bandit Bakura's Diabound and stopped the horrible Zorc from resurrecting... or did they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh's journey was more than a trip to the past, it's the greatest Shadow Game ever created. Yami Yugi and Yami Bakura's Shadow Game has already reached apocalyptic proportions, but it's only the beginning of cataclysmic events!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Zorc's incredible shadow energies have resurrected the bandit Bakura and his Diabound. With a second chance at revenge, the bandit king has broken up the Pharaoh's team so that he can divide and conquer them one at a time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The hope of mankind rests on Yugi's shoulders as he arrives at the final temple chamber where the Pharaoh's name is located, but something unexpected is waiting for them - a sinister surprise that can cost them their lives!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After a nearly eternal slumber, the all-powerful Zorc has resurrected, plunging the world into darkness!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and his guardians are down to their last line of defense as Shada falls victim to Zorc. The Pharaoh desperately wants to summon the three Egyptian Gods, but he can't without his Millennium Puzzle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Exodia the Forbidden One couldn't defeat Zorc! Exodia was able to buy enough time for the Pharaoh to get his Millennium Puzzle back-he can now summon the almighty Egyptian Gods! It's time for the Pharaoh's counterattack in the biggest brawl.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated. The Pharaoh is severely hurt and unable to stop Zorc from setting fire to the city, but our heroes aren't giving up. It's not double vision when Seto and Kaiba transcend time to confront Zorc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba's combined strength couldn't defeat Zorc. Yugi must give the Pharaoh his name, but Yugi doesn't know how to read ancient Egyptian text. All bets are off in the final clash where Yugi must protect the past to save the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pharaoh Atem, Yugi, and friends have defeated the bandit Bakura and Zorc, but the final test still awaits! Yugi must duel Atem! As they set sail to the final dueling grounds, everyone realizes this may be the final night Yugi and Atem have together.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi defeats Atem, Yugi will prove he's ready to stand on his own, and Atem can join his friends in the world beyond. But Yugi and Atem will be separated forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem has summoned all three Egyptian Gods! What chance does Yugi have against these powerful creatures that no one has been able to defeat? Yugi better think of a strategy quickly or this duel will be over soon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Victorious: Rex Dies
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck, and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: Victorious: The Diddly-Bops
programme.desc: Sikowitz recruits the gang to form a children's band for a friend's party. When a leaked video of the group's performance becomes popular, Andre struggles to be taken seriously as a musician.

programme.title: Victorious: Cat's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: Cat begins dating Tori's ex-boyfriend, Danny (Matt Angel) and Tori becomes jealous. Meanwhile, Trina convinces Robbie, Andre, Jade and Beck to indulge their feet in callus-eating fish that she's been buying from some stranger.

programme.title: Victorious: Sleepover at Sikowitz's
programme.desc: Sikowitz invites the gang to have a sleepover at his house in order to teach them a lesson in method acting.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam accidentally reveals to Carly that she and Freddie shared a secret kiss, Carly confronts them both about why they never told her about it. Meanwhile, Spencer goes to prison to teach an art class to convicts.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie defeat a famous TV chef in a cooking challenge, the chef gives up cooking, quits his show, and refuses to come out of his bedroom. Spencer tries to make his vision of the future a reality.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie accidentally get Principal Franklin fired, Miss Briggs and Mr. Howard take control and enforce harsh rules. Meanwhile, Spencer hires a grizzled old rodeo star to teach him to ride a mechanical bull.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam announces a "take Carly to the dance contest" for an upcoming Girls' Choice dance, so many boys show up that Carly, Sam, and Freddie have to hold a speed-dating session to meet them all.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie agree to make a music video for a pop star who's trying to make a comeback, they discover that she is out of shape and untalented. Spencer has trouble dating a woman when he discovers she's Gibby's mom.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Freddie saves Carly's life, Carly falls in love with him. Meanwhile, Sam and Spencer compete against each other in a paintball game called Assassin.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Gibby discovers Freddie and his girlfriend in a compromising position, he vows revenge and challenges Freddie to a fight. Meanwhile, Spencer's art career really takes off when the local paper incorrectly reports his death.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When the gang discovers that Lewbert was once a happy man engaged to a beautiful woman, they set out to reunite the lost lovers. Spencer joins the building watch to catch a thief that's been stealing from the apartments.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam reveals to Carly and Freddie that she used to compete in pageants as a young girl. When she learns that her long-time rival will be competing in Seattle, she convinces Carly to compete against her.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam ends up in jail, Carly and Freddie vow that the web show must go on. They try to enlist Spencer's help at that last minute but he has a date he can't cancel.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: An eccentric billionaire asks the iCarly gang to perform the first live web show from outer space. They go through a series of tests to make sure they're fit for space travel. Back at the loft, Spencer is visited by a mysterious little girl.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Bigfoot fever hits Seattle when hikers take some fuzzy footage of a suspicious figure in the woods. After an expert validates the footage on the web show, Carly convinces the gang to go upstate and join the search for Bigfoot.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Fed up with his Mom constantly treating him like a baby, Freddie decides to move out into his own place. The gang starts a successful pet photography business. They end up in a feud with a rival pet photo studio.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When a heatwave hits Seattle and the power goes out, Spencer comes to the rescue with a Norwegian air conditioner.

programme.desc: The Cast introduces bloopers and outtakes from the series.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly jokes on the web show that she can beat up Shelby Marx, the best female fighter in the world, Shelby challenges Carly to an exhibition match.

programme.title: iCarly
